_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 79.2% August 2024 bottom analog and swelling stablecoin reserves support a tentative UP leg from Denial toward Anxiety, but the analyst's MVRV divergence and 0% direction accuracy track record cap conviction at low until price holds above $63K with funding staying subdued.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both call direction UP and regime RISK_ON, but the analyst assigns low conviction with explicit false-leg warnings while the Narrative projects high-confidence mean reversion; the analyst's forward call targets Hope while the Narrative implies a faster path, creating a tempo disagreement on speed not direction.
next_move.confirmed_if: MVRV Z-score turns upward with BTC price holding above $63K and funding staying below 0.01%
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC breaks below $60K with VIX spiking above 22 and funding flipping negative — would signal true Capitulation/Panic leg down, not a recovery transition
